message:
Command `export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# For 6×6 SRAM arrangement, need usable_core ≥ 3407.2 × 2920.6
# Formula: --core-width = usable_core_w + 971 (IO_margin 421 + ring_inset×2 550)
# Conservative: --core-width 4500 --core-height 4000
CORE_WIDTH=4500
CORE_HEIGHT=4000

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo "  core dimensions: ${CORE_WIDTH}×${CORE_HEIGHT} µm (ensures 6×6 SRAM grid fits)"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \
    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# For 6×6 SRAM arrangement, need usable_core ≥ 3407.2 × 2920.6
# Formula: --core-width = usable_core_w + 971 (IO_margin 421 + ring_inset×2 550)
# Conservative: --core-width 4500 --core-height 4000
CORE_WIDTH=4500
CORE_HEIGHT=4000

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo "  core dimensions: ${CORE_WIDTH}×${CORE_HEIGHT} µm (ensures 6×6 SRAM grid fits)"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \
    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="", "timeout": 600}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# For 6×6 SRAM arrangement, need usable_core ≥ 3407.2 × 2920.6
# Formula: --core-width = usable_core_w + 971 (IO_margin 421 + ring_inset×2 550)
# Conservative: --core-width 4500 --core-height 4000
CORE_WIDTH=4500
CORE_HEIGHT=4000

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo "  core dimensions: ${CORE_WIDTH}×${CORE_HEIGHT} µm (ensures 6×6 SRAM grid fits)"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --core-width  $CORE_WIDTH \
    --core-height $CORE_HEIGHT 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="
